title: lithocarpus randaiensis
intro:
Lithocarpus randaiensis, also known as the Taiwanese cork tree, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family Fagaceae, native to Taiwan.

Its bark, leaves, and roots have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus randaiensis include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. Lithocarpus randaiensis can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as being used in traditional folk medicine to treat various ailments.
